title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: - **Medium**: Cross-domain explicit handling is still not consistently encoded as `BLOCKED + reroute`. Workspace canonical policy does require both, but domain docs only say reroute/stop routing without `BLOCKED`, so behavior can diverge by which file is consulted first. [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L28) [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L29) [FUGUE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/FUGUE.md#L13) [KERNEL.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/KERNEL.md#L14) - **Medium**: Domain-gate precedence is not explicit where Claude trigger mapping is defined. `~/.claude/AGENTS.md` keeps unconditional trigger-to-action mappings, but does not state that domain gate (`Kernel` explicit -> `BLOCKED/reroute`) must run first, so “bug fix + /kernel” remains ambiguous. [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/AGENTS.md#L60) [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/AGENTS.md#L63) [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L29) [CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CLAUDE.md#L19) - **Low**: GHA summary path is valid but still not minimal. It uses a dedicated `workflow-summary` job with its own checkout only to append a static file, which adds avoidable runtime. [ci.yml](/Users/masayuki/.claude/.github/workflows/ci.yml#L13) [ci.yml](/Users/masayuki/.claude/.github/workflows/ci.yml#L17) [ci.yml](/Users/masayuki/.claude/.github/workflows/ci.yml#L19)
